notes: Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Edmonton City Centre Airport). Representative of central Alberta parkland.
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Calgary International Airport). Drier winters than Edmonton; June peak.
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Red Deer Regional Airport).
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Lethbridge Airport). Dry, chinook-prone.
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Medicine Hat Regional Airport). The driest part of Alberta.
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Fort McMurray Airport).
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Grande Prairie Airport).
Environment Canada 1981-2010 climate normal (Banff). Mountain station — higher winter precipitation as snow.
Approximate Environment Canada 1981-2010 normal (Regina Int'l A). Semi-arid; June precipitation peak. Representative of the Regina/Lumsden plains.
Approximate Environment Canada 1981-2010 normal (Saskatoon Diefenbaker Int'l A). One of the drier prairie cities.
Approximate Environment Canada 1981-2010 normal (Swift Current A). Dry mixed-grass; drought-tolerant species recommended.
Approximate Environment Canada 1981-2010 normal (North Battleford A). Parkland transition north of the grasslands.
